docs.title: Welcome to MkDocs
docs.text: For full documentation visit mkdocs.org.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: ARC(c)
docs.text:
Input: The request stream \(x_1,x_2,...,x_t,...\).

INITIALIZATION: Set \(p=0\) and set the LRU lists \(T_1,B_1,T_2,\) and \(B_2\) to empty.

For every \(t\ge1\) and any \(x_t\), one and only one of the following four cases must occur.

docs.title: Case 1
docs.text:
\(x_t\) is in \(T_1\) or \(T_2\). A cache hit has occurred in ARC(c) and DBL(2c).

Move \(x_t\) to MRU position in \(T_2\).

NOTE: 缓存命中，调整页面到MFU列表(即\(T_2\))表头

docs.title: Case 2
docs.text:
\(x_t\) is in \(B_1\). A cache miss (resp. hit) has occurred in ARC(c) (resp. DBL(2c)).

ADAPTATION: Update \(p=\min(p+\delta_1,c)\) where \(\delta_1 =\left \{ \begin{array}{c} 1\qquad if |B_1| \ge|B_2|\\ |B_2|/|B_1|\quad otherwise \end{array}\right.\)

REPLACE(\(x_t,p\)). Move \(x_t\) from \(B_1\) to the \(MRU\) position in \(T_2\) (also fetch \(x_t\) to the cache).

NOTE: 这里\(B_1\)即mru_ghost.此例为失缓存而得记录者。应移至\(T_2\)即mfu表头。这里的参数p如何调整？为什么这么调整。根据论文的C.Learning一节可知，如果\(B_1\)命中应该增加\(T_1\)大小，\(B_2\)也如是。也就是说，如果一个从\(T_1\)中被淘汰的页面在被彻底淘汰前又被访问了，说明\(T_1\)太小，所以需要加大\(T_1\)的目标值，也就是p

docs.title: Case3
docs.text:
\(x_t\) is in \(B_2\). A cache miss (resp. hit) has occurred in ARC(c) (resp. DBL(2c)).

ADAPTATION: Update \(p=\min(p-\delta_2,c)\) where \(\delta_2 =\left \{ \begin{array}{c} 1\qquad if |B_2| \ge|B_1|\\ |B_1|/|B_2|\quad otherwise \end{array}\right.\)

REPLACE(\(x_t,p\)). Move \(x_t\) from \(B_2\) to the \(MRU\) position in \(T_2\) (also fetch \(x_t\) to the cache).

docs.title: Case 4
docs.text: \(x_t\) is not in \(T_1\cup B_1\cup T_2\cup B_2\). A cache miss has occurred in ARC(c) and DBL(2c).

docs.title: Case A: \(L_1=T_1\cup B_1\) has exactly \(c\) pages.
docs.text:
​ If (\(|T_1|\lt c\))

​ Delete LRU page in \(B_1\). REPLACE(\(x_t\),p).

​ else

​ Here \(B_1\) is empty. Delete LRU page in \(T_1\) (also remove it from the cache).

​ endif

docs.title: Case B: \(L_1=T_1\cup B_1\) has less than \(c\) pages.
docs.text:
​ If (\(|T_1|+|T_2|+|B_1|+|B_2| \ge c\))

​ Delete LRU page in \(B_2\), if (\(|T_1|+|T_2|+|B_1|+|B_2| = 2c\)).

​ REPLACE(\(x_t,p\))

​ endif

Finally, fetch \(x_t\) to the cache and move it to MRU position in \(T_1\).

NOTE: 这种情况必须把\(x_t\)移到\(T_1\)中。如果\(L_1\)满了（Case A），需要从\(L_1\)中移除一个记录，如果\(T_1\)没满，即\(B_1\)非空，就移除\(B_1\)的LRU page ,如果\(T_1\)满了，就移除\(T_1\)的LRU page。简而言之，就是始终移除\(L_1\)的LRU page。Case A和Case B中的两个 REPLACE是为了把\(T_1(resp. T_2)\)中的LRU page移到\(B_1(resp.B_2)\)中去（变成对应列表的MRU page），这样\(T_1(resp. T_2)\)就可以腾出空间放\(x_t\)了，这一部分可以参考这一篇论文2的附录代码。

docs.title: 参考文献
docs.text:
1. https://www.cs.cmu.edu/~natassa/courses/15-721/papers/arcfast.pdf "ARC: A SELF-TUNING, LOW OVERHEAD REPLACEMENT CACHE ↩

  2. https://arxiv.org/pdf/1503.07624 "Analyzing Adaptive Cache Replacement Strategies" ↩

docs.title: Q2[10 points]
docs.text:
Find all artists born in the 1970s in England who have independently released music (without collaborators). List them in alphabetical order by artist name.

File: q2_solo_artist

Hints: The artist_count field in artist_credit denotes the number of artists involved in a release. England is an area name. Only consider artists who is a Person.

Your output should look like this:

ARTIST_NAME

Your first row should look like this:

Bashful

docs.title: 解析
docs.text:
select distinct(a1.name) 
from artist_credit as ac 
JOIN (select a.name 
      from artist as a 
      JOIN area on a.area=area.id and area.name='England' 
      JOIN artist_type on artist_type.name='Person' and artist_type.id=a.type 
      where a.begin_date_year>=1970 and a.begin_date_year<1980) 
      as a1 
on ac.name=a1.name and ac.artist_count=1 
order by a1.name;

分为两个步骤，第一步是查询所有出生于70年代并且来自England并且artist_type是Person的人员。第二步是根据这个人员名单表去artist_credit表中根据artist_count查询每个人的音乐发行的参与者

docs.title: 输出
docs.text:
Bashful
David Readman
Dusty Wagon
Henry J. Walmsley
Ian Parker
Jo Beth Young
Levente
Luke Warm
Malia
Matthew Brown
Paul Lawler
Paul Walton
Phil Collins
Ryan Webb
Sophia Dady
Talitha Rise

docs.title: Q3[10points]
docs.text:
这一题我使用的方式有点复杂。嵌套了5层sql，应该是最烂的解法。

Find the ten latest releases by female artists in the German language. Order the results by release date from newest to oldest, and then by release name and artist name alphabetically.

File: q3_german_female_artists

Details: If there are releases with identical names and dates by the same artist, treat them as a single release and avoid duplicate entries. Format the release_date in the result as YYYY-MM-DD, without adding a leading zero if the month or day is less than 10.

Your output should look like this:

RELEASE_DATE|RELEASE_NAME|ARTIST_NAME

Your first row should look like this:

2020-9-25|The Songs of Johannes Brahms ~ 10|Sophie Rennert

docs.title: 解析
docs.text:
该题涉及至少四个relation（数据表），如下图所示。一个release对应一个artist_credit，而一个artist_credit对应多个artist_credit_name，所以artist_credit可以被消去，直接使用一个release对应多个artist_credit。

erDiagram
    release ||--|| release_info : includes
    release ||--|{ language : uses
    release ||--|| artist_credit : by
    artist_credit ||--|{ artist_credit_name : comprises
    artist_credit_name ||--|| artist : maps
    artist ||--|| gender : has
    release {
   id INTEGER 
   name TEXT
   artist_credit INTEGER
   status INTEGER
   language INTEGER
   comment TEXT
    }
release_info {
   release INTEGER
   area INTEGER
   date_year INTEGER
   date_month INTEGER
   date_day INTEGER
}
    language {
   id INTEGER
   name TEXT
    }
    artist_credit {
   id INTEGER
   name TEXT
   artist_count INTEGER
    }
    artist_credit_name {
   artist_credit INTEGER
   position INTEGER
   artist INTEGER
   name TEXT
    }
    artist {
   id INTEGER
   name TEXT
begin_date_year INTEGER
   begin_date_month INTEGER
   begin_date_day INTEGER
   end_date_year INTEGER
   end_date_month INTEGER
   end_date_day INTEGER
   type INTEGER
   area INTEGER
   gender INTEGER
   comment TEXT
    }
    gender {
   id INTEGER
   name TEXT
   description TEXT
    }

思路是先获取language=‘German'的release作为re0，re0 join release_info获取年月日字段得到re1，re1 join artist_credit_name 获取一个release对应的各个artist作为re3，re3 join gender得到满足所有artist为女性的表。 该表用根据关键字排序，DISTINCT关键字去重，输出前十行。最后用printf函数把年日月转换为格式化日期字符串。

感觉有点像合并树的节点。每次挑选两个节点进行合并，直到剩下最后一个节点

docs.title: 输出
docs.text:
2020-9-25|The Songs of Johannes Brahms ~ 10|Sophie Rennert
2020-8-14|Verwoben|Martina Claussen
2020-7-9|Geh dein Weg|Loredana
2020-7-25|Hysteria|Strobo.Lolita
2020-7-2|Kein Limit|Aylo
2020-7-16|Never Know|Shirin David
2020-7-30|Signal|badmómzjay
2020-7-3|Sui Sui|Haiyti
2020-7-16|Vertrau mir|Juju
2020-6-12|Columbiana|addeN

docs.title: Q4[10points]
docs.text:
List the artist groups with the longest names in each area where the area name starts with the letter "Z". Organize the final output by sorting first by area name and then by artist name in alphabetical order. If multiple groups within the same area share the longest names, include them all.

File: q4_longest_name

Hints: Group is an artist_type. If multiple areas have different id, but the same name, consider them as the same area.

Your output should look like this:

AREA_NAME|ARTIST_NAME

One of the rows in the output looks like the following:

Zaandam|TheBeatVillain

docs.title: 解析
docs.text:
一开始用的是下面这种方法，问题是无法处理一个area中存在多个最大值的情况。

select n2.area_name,n2.artist_name from
(
select max(length(n1.name))
from (
    select artist.name,artist.area
    from 
    artist 
    join artist_type 
    on artist.type=artist_type.id and artist_type.name='Group'
    ) as n1 
join area 
on area.name LIKE 'Z%' and n1.area=area.id
group by area.name
) as n2

后面利用CTE减少重复查询。思路是先查询artist、artist_type和area建一个表n1，包含了artist_name、area_name、length(aritst_name)等，然后n1 join area再通过 group by 分组建立表n2，这样n2包含了每个地区的artist_name的最大值，然后n2 join n1再查询一次，匹配n1中artist_name长度等于n2中对应地区的长度最大值。

docs.title: 问题：P1和P2等价吗？
docs.text:
bob_take_seat_1 = And(b1,Not(b2),Not(b3),Not(a1),Not(c1))表示bob坐1号位并且bob不做2号位和3号位，并且alice不坐1号位，calro不坐1号位。从中可以提炼出命题如P1和P2:

\(P1:b1 o ~b2 \land ~b3 \land ~a1 \land ~c1\)

\(P2:b1 \land eg(b2)\land eg(b3)\land eg(a1) \land eg(c1))\)

Z3 found a counterexample

[b3 = False, a1 = False, b1 = False, c1 = False, b2 = True] 带入发现确实

P2:F T F F F

P1:F -> F&T&T&T

docs.title: 解释：
docs.text: implies 意思是忽略错误前提而考虑正确前提 命题bob坐在1号位，是必须真的坐在1号位的，所以不能忽略bob不坐在1号位的情况 把命题P1改成 b1 & (b1 -> ~b2 & ~b3 & ~a1 & ~c1)即可proved

docs.title: 总结
docs.text: P ^ P->Q P ^ Q是等价的

docs.title: ARC(c)
docs.text:
Input: The request stream \(x_1,x_2,...,x_t,...\).

INITIALIZATION: Set \(p=0\) and set the LRU lists \(T_1,B_1,T_2,\) and \(B_2\) to empty.

For every \(t\ge1\) and any \(x_t\), one and only one of the following four cases must occur.

docs.title: Case 1
docs.text:
\(x_t\) is in \(T_1\) or \(T_2\). A cache hit has occurred in ARC(c) and DBL(2c).

Move \(x_t\) to MRU position in \(T_2\).

NOTE: 缓存命中，调整页面到MFU列表(即\(T_2\))表头

docs.title: Case 2
docs.text:
\(x_t\) is in \(B_1\). A cache miss (resp. hit) has occurred in ARC(c) (resp. DBL(2c)).

ADAPTATION: Update \(p=\min(p+\delta_1,c)\) where $\(\delta_1 =\left \{ \begin{array}{c} 1\qquad if |B_1| \ge|B_2|\\ |B_2|/|B_1|\quad otherwise \end{array}\right.\)$

REPLACE(\(x_t,p\)). Move \(x_t\) from \(B_1\) to the \(MRU\) position in \(T_2\) (also fetch \(x_t\) to the cache).

NOTE: 这里\(B_1\)即mru_ghost.此例为失缓存而得记录者。应移至\(T_2\)即mfu表头。这里的参数p如何调整？为什么这么调整。根据论文的C.Learning一节可知，如果\(B_1\)命中应该增加\(T_1\)大小，\(B_2\)也如是。也就是说，如果一个从\(T_1\)中被淘汰的页面在被彻底淘汰前又被访问了，说明\(T_1\)太小，所以需要加大\(T_1\)的目标值，也就是p

docs.title: Case3
docs.text:
\(x_t\) is in \(B_2\). A cache miss (resp. hit) has occurred in ARC(c) (resp. DBL(2c)).

ADAPTATION: Update \(p=\min(p-\delta_2,c)\) where $\(\delta_2 =\left \{ \begin{array}{c} 1\qquad if |B_2| \ge|B_1|\\ |B_1|/|B_2|\quad otherwise \end{array}\right.\)$

REPLACE(\(x_t,p\)). Move \(x_t\) from \(B_2\) to the \(MRU\) position in \(T_2\) (also fetch \(x_t\) to the cache).

docs.title: Case 4
docs.text: \(x_t\) is not in \(T_1\cup B_1\cup T_2\cup B_2\). A cache miss has occurred in ARC(c) and DBL(2c).

docs.title: Case A: \(L_1=T_1\cup B_1\) has exactly \(c\) pages.
docs.text:
​ If (\(|T_1|\lt c\))

​ Delete LRU page in \(B_1\). REPLACE(\(x_t\),p).

​ else

​ Here \(B_1\) is empty. Delete LRU page in \(T_1\) (also remove it from the cache).

​ endif

docs.title: Case B: \(L_1=T_1\cup B_1\) has less than \(c\) pages.
docs.text:
​ If (\(|T_1|+|T_2|+|B_1|+|B_2| \ge c\))

​ Delete LRU page in \(B_2\), if (\(|T_1|+|T_2|+|B_1|+|B_2| = 2c\)).

​ REPLACE(\(x_t,p\))

​ endif

Finally, fetch \(x_t\) to the cache and move it to MRU position in \(T_1\).

NOTE: 这种情况必须把\(x_t\)移到\(T_1\)中。如果\(L_1\)满了（Case A），需要从\(L_1\)中移除一个记录，如果\(T_1\)没满，即\(B_1\)非空，就移除\(B_1\)的LRU page ,如果\(T_1\)满了，就移除\(T_1\)的LRU page。简而言之，就是始终移除\(L_1\)的LRU page。Case A和Case B中的两个 REPLACE是为了把\(T_1(resp. T_2)\)中的LRU page移到\(B_1(resp.B_2)\)中去（变成对应列表的MRU page），这样\(T_1(resp. T_2)\)就可以腾出空间放\(x_t\)了，这一部分可以参考这一篇论文的附录代码。
